notes: Stage 0 intake only. No STEP export and no Alpha shop-compile (Gate A) has been run for this product. Reed-coupon (P0) and single-pipe control (P1) measurements are still outstanding for both branches (free-reed-empirical-loop.md, cad/p0-p1-control-parameters.csv) — reed/reed-table geometry, windchest chamber, and voicing remain unmodeled and out of scope for cad/sheng.scad. Both architecture branches (traditional-side-branch, compact-control) are listed because this packet explicitly compares them; neither is picked as a winner.
